message:
fix(snapshot): atomize session update into checkpoint transaction and fix per-session retention

Move UPDATE mux_sessions inside save_checkpoint_sync transaction so
checkpoint and session metadata update are atomic (crash can't leave
them inconsistent). Refactor serialized_states to use named-field struct.

Fix cleanup_sync to use ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session_id)
so retention_count is applied per-session, not globally. Previously
a single session with many checkpoints could consume the entire
retention budget.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
